name: Numerai Meta Model
curator_notes: Numerai's Meta Model is an unusual entity: a hedge fund whose trading signals come from an ensemble of thousands of data scientists' models, coordinated via the NMR token and staking mechanism. The 'agent' here is the aggregated intelligence of the crowd, filtered through stake-weighted consensus. Operating since 2015, it manages real capital and has pioneered novel approaches to crowdsourced intelligence. Lower narrative score reflects that it's more infrastructure than character—but its persistence and economic reality are unquestionable. A canonical example of decentralized intelligence that predates the current 'agent' discourse.

score_rationale.persistence: Operating continuously since December 2015. 10+ years of proven operation. Institutional-grade persistence.
score_rationale.autonomy: The meta model operates autonomously once signals are submitted. Human models feed it, but aggregation and execution are autonomous.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: Influential in ML/quant communities but less mainstream recognition. Respected but niche.
score_rationale.economic_reality: Manages real hedge fund capital ($100M+); NMR token with significant market cap; pays out to stakers.
score_rationale.governance: Hybrid: Numerai Inc controls platform, but signal weights determined by stake (pseudo-decentralized).
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: Pioneered erasure encoding for data privacy, stake-weighted ensembling, novel tournament structure.
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: More infrastructure than character. No distinct personality, but clear purpose: crowdsourced alpha generation.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: NMR token with staking mechanism. Hedge fund manages $100M+ AUM. Data scientists stake NMR on predictions and earn/lose real value. Active marketplace for signals with real economic consequences. On-chain staking on Ethereum. However, core hedge fund operations are traditional/off-chain. Hybrid model — on-chain staking layer on top of traditional finance infrastructure.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: NMR token on Ethereum provides on-chain anchoring. Staking contract addresses serve as identity artifacts. No agent-specific identity standard. Identity primarily institutional (Numerai Inc.) with on-chain token layer. The Meta Model itself has no portable agent identity — it's infrastructure, not an entity.

evidence.claim: TechCrunch (Dec 2016) documents Numerai one year post-launch as 'crowdsourced hedge fund for machine learning experts' — earliest independent press coverage at the company's inception window. Establishes the >10-year operating arc.

Bloomberg (Oct 2018) profile of Craib's quant marketplace — top-tier financial press confirming Numerai's continuity through the 2017-2018 crypto cycle and into the second-stage product (Numerai Signals).

Bloomberg (Aug 2025) — JPMorgan Asset Management commits up to $500M to Numerai over the following year, more than doubling AUM toward ~$1B. Top-tier institutional validation of real-money economic activity.
Hedgeweek industry-trade coverage of the JPMorgan $500M capacity allocation — independent hedge-fund-industry verification of the AUM scale claim.

Globe and Mail (Nov 2025) — Numerai raises $30M Series C at $500M valuation, led by top university endowments. Third-party financial press confirming sustained capital formation alongside the operational hedge fund.
Gemini Cryptopedia technical writeup of the Numerai Tournament and stake-weighted Meta Model — third-party crypto-exchange educational resource documenting the architecture in detail.
Gemini Cryptopedia 'Data and Prediction Markets on Erasure Protocol' — independent technical documentation of the Erasure Protocol layer that anchors the staking-and-signals economic infrastructure.

Wikipedia entry summarizing the stake-weighted aggregation, NMR burn mechanic, and governance structure — third-party reference encyclopedia confirming the hybrid (corporate + crowd-staked) governance model.

Bloomberg (Aug 2025) — coverage describes Numerai trading via AI Meta Model fed by ~7,500 anonymous data scientists, with execution autonomous from any single contributor. Independent verification of the autonomy claim.
Mad Money / Matt Turck long-form interview with Richard Craib — independent industry venue documenting Numerai's framing as 'the last hedge fund' and its role in the broader AI-finance discourse.
FinTech Global (Nov 2025) coverage of the $30M Series C — independent fintech-industry confirmation that Numerai is recognized as a foundational AI-hedge-fund reference, not a niche crypto curio.

Coinmetro 'NMR (Numeraire) - When Crypto, AI & Stock Markets Merge' — third-party exchange writeup documenting the NMR staking mechanism that ties the on-chain layer to off-chain hedge fund operations.
